message:
chore(beads): file 3 golden-test gap beads (u9osp, z2hck, piprx)

Applied /testing-golden-artifacts skill to cass. Survey identified three
concrete gaps where output regression coverage is weak:

- u9osp (P2): robot-mode JSON outputs (capabilities, robot-docs, health,
  models status) have no schema-freezing golden. Each is the LLM contract
  surface; schema drift silently breaks downstream agents.

- z2hck (P2): cass export-html output is fragment-checked only — the full
  self-contained HTML (DOCTYPE + embedded CSS + embedded JS + payload
  framing) is never byte-compared against a scrubbed golden.

- piprx (P2): 35 existing insta snapshots freeze single rendered frames;
  multi-keystroke flow transitions (search → detail → tab cycling → find)
  have no golden coverage. Regressions on state transitions slip through.

Each bead specifies the skill pattern (scrubbed / canonicalized / exact),
golden file layout, scrubbing rules for non-determinism, and PROVENANCE
requirements per the skill's checklist.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
